---
title: "Home Predictathon"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Pull and explore input data

## Phenotype data 

- [Pull phenotypic data from T3](phenotypic_data.html). In that script, we pull metadata out of the trials related to target trials

- [Analyze phenotypic data](pheno_data_analysis.html). In this script, we load phenotypic data and explore phenotypic data distribution, structure, and check for outliers.

## Genotypic data

- [Pull genotypic data focal accessions](pullGenoTrial.html). In that script, we download vcf data for focal accession genotypes

- [Pull genotypic data non-focal accessions](pullGenoAssociatedTrials.html). In this script, we download vcf files for more genotypes, not only focal accessions but also genotypes tested in the same program.

## Environmental covariates

- [Pull environmental covariates from NASA POWER](environmental_covariates.html). In this script, we download weather data for a few variables (temperature, ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN, and total precipitation), based on the GPS coordinates of the trial location.

# Fit prediction models

- [Genomic prediction GBLUP/RKHS](genom_pred.html). In this script, we apply genomic prediction for the CV0 and CV00
